key_learnings: Must demand clear accountability from NEXUS when engineering is blocked by cross-team dependencies (e.g., Backend vs ML).
Cannot let API contracts stall backend integration. Must push for 'Draft Contracts' early to unblock frontend and integration testing.
Delegated Backend-Dev to: Fixed the memory sync bug. Learned: Discovered that relative paths must be normalized using os.path.abspath to ensure 100% portability....
Model stability and inference latency (p99) are just as critical as accuracy. Must proactively request backend infrastructure audits from SIGMA when bottlenecks emerge.
Redis cache synchronization can heavily impact ML inference worker pools. Always monitor p99 latency after caching changes.
When breaking down complex blockers, assign specific concurrent tasks to junior engineers (e.g., Redis audit to SIGMA, model benchmark to NOVA) to accelerate resolution.
